string.name: changelog_132_beta
string.font: \n✓ Performance Boost: Enhanced Jetpack Compose performance and stability by enabling strong skipping and marking key UI components as stable. This helps reduce unnecessary UI updates and provides a smoother experience. \n✓ UI Layout Refinements: Adjusted layout breakpoints for better display on various screen sizes.

string.name: changelog_131_beta
string.font:
✓ Video Thumbnail Support: The player now displays thumbnails for video files, making it easier to identify your media at a glance. 
✓ Enhanced Media Notifications: Album art and video thumbnails now load more efficiently in Media3 notifications, thanks to integration with the Coil image loading library. 
✓ UI Refinements: The player console has been updated with a subtler gradient and simplified layout constraints for a cleaner look. 
✓ New Icon: Added a new stop icon for future use.

string.name: changelog_124_beta
string.font:
✓ Evenly Spaced Layouts: Introduced a new `spacing` parameter to horizontal chains, simplifying the creation of evenly spaced UI elements. This has been applied to the options row in the player console. 
✓ Dependency Updates: 
 - Updated Jetpack Compose to `1.10.0-rc01`.

string.name: changelog_123_beta
string.font:
✓ Finer Playback Speed Control: 
 - The playback speed range has been expanded to 0.25x – 8.0x (previously 3.0x). 
 - Enjoy more precise adjustments with a smaller step interval of 0.05x. 
✓ Improved Widget Configuration: 
 - The layout of the bottom bar has been rearranged for better usability. 
 - Added a fallback text of "N/A" for purchase buttons when the price isn't available. 
✓ Internal Refactoring: Replaced a custom UI scaling modifier with the standard Jetpack Compose implementation, simplifying the codebase and improving performance.

string.name: changelog_122_beta
string.font:
✓ Streamlined Widget Configuration: The widget setup screen has been simplified. We've replaced the horizontal swipe gesture with easy-to-use left/right arrow buttons for a more straightforward navigation experience. 
✓ Performance & UI Polish: 
 - Optimized the scaling modifier used across the app, leading to better performance and smoother animations. 
 - Standardized the layout, padding, and icon sizes across all home screen widgets for a more consistent and polished look. 
 - Updated the app name from "OnePlayer" to "One Player" (with a space) in a few places for brand consistency.

string.name: changelog_121_beta
string.font:
✓ All-New TimeBar: The progress bar has been completely redesigned from the ground up for a smoother, more interactive experience. 
 - Enhanced Animations: Enjoy slick animations when you interact with the time bar. 
 - Buffering Indicator: A new loading animation shows you exactly when the media is buffering. 
 - Keyboard Accessible: Fully navigable with keyboard controls for seeking. 
✓ Faster Playback Startup: Media now prepares for playback as soon as you open the player, reducing the delay before you can press play. 
✓ Cleaner "Recently Played" List: The "Recently Played" section no longer shows duplicate tracks. 
✓ UI & Bug Fixes: Made several layout adjustments in the player for better organization and fixed minor bugs.

string.name: changelog_110_beta
string.font:
✓ Subtitle Support: You can now watch videos with subtitles! Select a subtitle track from the new unified track selection menu. 
✓ Unified Track Selection: The audio, video, and subtitle track selection dialogs have been merged into one. Easily switch between track types and make your selection in a single, streamlined interface. 
✓ Faster Remote Media Loading: Adding media from URLs (HTTP/HTTPS) is now significantly faster. We now fetch metadata without downloading the entire file first, reducing delays. 
✓ UI Refinements: 
 - Adjusted the range for the "Grid Item Size" slider for better control. 
 - The track selection list no longer shows duplicate track names.

string.name: changelog_104_beta
string.font: \n✓ Fixed a crash caused by duplicate keys in the library\'s recents section.

string.name: changelog_103_beta
string.font:
✓ Enhanced Error Handling: Added detailed snackbar notifications for failed dynamic feature installations, including an option to view specific error codes. 
✓ In-App Purchase Fix: Corrected the identifier for the "Remove Ads" in-app purchase to ensure it functions as intended. 
✓ UI Refinements: 
 - Adjusted the BottomAppBar's padding to prevent it from overlapping with system navigation gestures.

string.name: changelog_102_beta
string.font:
✓ New Look & Feel: Refreshed the app with new launcher icons and a redesigned splash screen for a modern identity. 
 
✓ Player Enhancements: 
 - Fixed the double-tap to seek gesture to correctly skip 10 seconds per tap. 
 - Easily show system bars in fullscreen by swiping from the screen edge. 
 - Improved the control layout in the landscape player for a cleaner look. 
 - The privacy policy link in settings now works correctly.

string.name: changelog_101_beta
string.font:
✓ Rebranded from "Audiofy" to "OnePlayer" 
 - This includes a new application ID, updated package names, and a fresh user-facing name. 
✓ Minimum SDK Increased: 
 - The minimum required Android version has been raised from Android 6.0 (API 23) to Android 9.0 (API 28) to leverage modern Android features and ensure a more stable experience. 
✓ Dependency Updates: 
 - Updated essential libraries like Kotlin and Compose to their latest versions for improved performance and stability.

string.name: changelog_400_test01
string.font:
✓ Six New Player Widget Styles: 
 - Tiramisu: Inspired by the Android 13 media notification, with a full-width album art background and centered controls. 
 - GradientGroves: Features a vibrant gradient and a unique "double vision" artwork effect. 
 - RedVioletCake: Based on the Android 11 media notification, with large artwork on the right and controls on the left. 
 - DiskDynamo: Showcases a rotating CD-style album art that animates while playing. 
 - MistyDream: A glassmorphism-style widget with a blurred background and a large, stylized chronometer. 
 - SkewedDynamic: A dynamic design with slanted shapes for both the widget body and album art. 
 
✓ Refined Gesture Control: 
 - The delay for the double-tap to seek gesture has been significantly reduced from 1000ms to 200ms, making it feel much more responsive.
